game-arts-showcase.png: Game Arts Fall Showcase poster featuring cartoon illustrated characters in warm yellows and greens arranged around a hand-lettered title banner.
mfathesis.jpg: CCA MFA Thesis promotional graphic with large white bold type over an abstract background of layered teal and purple curved shapes.
roxie.jpg: Street-level exterior of the Roxie Theater in San Francisco, with its red neon marquee sign visible above the blue-painted facade and a pedestrian standing near the entrance.
poster.png: CCA Design Division and Architecture Division End of Year Show poster in pink and dark navy, listing the event date of May 10th, 2024, at 818 Eighth Street, San Francisco, with bold fragmented letterforms as the dominant graphic element.

previousCommencementPhotos-012-03-2026-J: Two people share an embrace on outdoor steps in front of a purple and silver balloon arch at a CCA celebration event.

previousEOYShowPhotos-001-03-2026.jpg: A visitor examines a cardboard-constructed tabletop game installation titled 'Saint Susie' at an End of Year Show, featuring a sculpted paper bag figure and a church-shaped backdrop.
previousEOYShowPhotos-002-03-2026.jpg: An orange 3D-printed architectural scale model with sweeping canopy forms sits on a layered wood base at an Architecture End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-003-03-2026.jpg: A hyper-realistic sculptural figure with a deer head and human body in casual clothing sits on a patterned rug in a gallery corner, surrounded by paintings.
previousEOYShowPhotos-004-03-2026.jpg: A Fine Arts student holds a bouquet of flowers while standing in front of two large figurative oil paintings in warm earthy tones at an End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-005-03-2026.jpg: A sculptural installation features antique wooden chairs filled with dried grasses and straw arranged on a woven mat beside a set dining table.
previousEOYShowPhotos-006-03-2026.jpg: Four students pose together in front of a large-scale typographic installation with oversized letterforms mounted on white panels during the End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-007-03-2026.jpg: A student in a white outfit stands beside a table installation featuring a toaster, plates of food, hay, and wooden chairs arranged on a bare wood surface in an industrial exhibition hall.
previousEOYShowPhotos-008-03-2026.jpg: A large crowd of visitors moves through a wide-open exhibition hall lined with student work on panels and walls during the End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-009-03-2026.jpg: Two visitors examine a colorful printed publication together at a display table, with framed photographs and a blue textile work visible on the wall behind them.
previousEOYShowPhotos-010-03-2026.jpg: Two visitors look closely at a diptych screen-based work displaying layered organic imagery in red and green, with clear cups and a can arranged on a shelf below.
previousEOYShowPhotos-011-03-2026.jpg: A Design student presents her branding project to a visitor at a table display, with a grid of colorful posters and a monitor behind her.
previousEOYShowPhotos-012-03-2026.jpg: Attendees browse an outdoor End of Year Show display table covered with printed materials, a potted plant, and colorful packaged objects.
previousEOYShowPhotos-013-03-2026.jpg: A large crowd fills the outdoor courtyard of CCA's campus for an End of Year Show opening, with spectators also gathered on rooftop overlooks.
previousEOYShowPhotos-014-03-2026.jpg: A Fashion student walks an outdoor runway in a yellow top, wide brown trousers, and large pink geometric accessories, with a seated crowd watching.
previousEOYShowPhotos-015-03-2026.jpg: Visitors examine a long table of geometric wire-and-fabric structural models at the CCA Architecture End of Year Show exhibition.
previousEOYShowPhotos-016-03-2026.jpg: Two visitors talk and laugh in front of a densely decorated End of Year Show booth covered in printed pattern wallpaper, framed artworks, and colorful graphic posters.
previousEOYShowPhotos-017-03-2026.jpg: Carved and assembled wooden objects — including geometric star forms, a mirror, a woven coaster, and engraved panels — are arranged on a round table edged with decorative stitching.
previousEOYShowPhotos-018-03-2026.jpg: Two terracotta-colored ceramic sculptures resembling textured claw-like hands emerge from a mound of soil on a white pedestal.
previousEOYShowPhotos-019-03-2026.jpg: A large industrial exhibition hall displays Graphic Design student work, including a mixed-media wall installation with collaged type, a video monitor, and painted panels under exposed steel trusses.
previousEOYShowPhotos-020-03-2026.jpg: An oil painting depicts a figure in a green blouse with painted facial markings, framed by a pink arch and orange flame motifs on a lavender background.
previousEOYShowPhotos-021-03-2026.jpg: A student sits on a handcrafted wooden bench in a bright studio space, surrounded by small ceramic objects and shelved items, with process photos pinned to a screen behind him.
previousEOYShowPhotos-022-03-2026.jpg: A student identified as Grace Sieg sits cross-legged on the floor in front of her End of Year Show display, which includes colorful sculptural forms, a process board, and spread-out printed materials.
previousEOYShowPhotos-023-03-2026.jpg: A student project display titled 'What Does This Meme?' features a white wall covered with printed internet memes and images arranged in a dense collage, with a QR code and instructional text panel.
previousEOYShowPhotos-024-03-2026.jpg: A student presents beside a large monitor showing scientific Schlieren technique imagery, with blue star-shaped sculptural forms on wooden dowels arranged on a pedestal nearby.
previousEOYShowPhotos-025-03-2026.jpg: A large accordion-folded painted screen depicting figurative scenes and Chinese calligraphy text stands open in an industrial exhibition hall with concrete walls and overhead strip lighting.
previousEOYShowPhotos-026-03-2026.jpg: A person uses mallets to play a cluster of dark, organic-form ceramic vessels arranged as a sculptural instrument during an End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-027-03-2026.jpg: A Fine Arts student stands covered in soil beside a mound of dirt on a white pedestal, with large paintings of blue-and-white porcelain vases on colorful geometric backgrounds behind her.
previousEOYShowPhotos-028-03-2026.jpg: A large-scale printed fabric work depicting a crowd scene with animal imagery hangs from chains in an exhibition space, with visitors standing nearby.
previousEOYShowPhotos-029-03-2026.jpg: A grid of hand-carved relief tiles in copper, black, and teal displays a variety of abstract and figurative motifs across the entire composition.
previousEOYShowPhotos-030-03-2026.jpg: Open artist books and printed photographs spread across stacked wooden platforms of varying heights on a concrete gallery floor.

arch-final-conversations-fa25-022.jpg: Architecture students and reviewers gather in a sunlit studio hall, examining drawings and models pinned along a long white partition wall.
arch-final-conversations-fa25-026.jpg: An Architecture student points to pinned renderings and sketches on a critique wall, with white scale models visible on the table beside her.
arch-final-conversations-fa25-083.jpg: An Architecture student presents to a seated group of critics and peers in a large studio space, with white and red-accented scale models arranged on the table in the foreground.
arch-final-conversations-fa25-084.jpg: Reviewers and Architecture students lean in to examine a series of large structural models made from thin wooden sticks laid out on a long white table.
arch-final-conversations-fa25-150.jpg: A grid of nine material sample tiles in shades of blue and gray, each embedded with different botanical and granular elements such as star anise and seeds.
arch-final-conversations-fa25-152.jpg: Dozens of tightly rolled paper sheets in mixed colors are stacked end-on, revealing circular cross-sections of blue, red, orange, and green painted edges.

arch-howsoon-sp26-68.jpg: A laser-cut wood topographic site model with white volumetric building forms arranged across contoured terrain layers.
arch-howsoon-sp26-77.jpg: Architecture studio exhibition showing scale models, cardboard and wood structures, and books arranged on blue wire-grid tables, with a pinboard of printed images covering the wall behind.
arch-howsoon-sp26-79.jpg: A large white exhibition wall displays a grid of architectural photographs connected by hand-drawn blue arrows, installed in a bright high-ceilinged studio space.
commencement-masters24.jpg: Master's graduates in caps and gowns toss their mortarboard hats into the air outside a white stone building on a sunny day.
core-2d-perspective-collage-fa25.jpg: Students install and review drawings and collages along white gallery walls during a Core studio critique, with prints spread across the floor.
design-senior-show-fa25-39.jpg: Visitors browse student work displayed on white exhibition panels inside the large industrial hall of the CCA campus during the Design senior show.
design-senior-show-fa25-54.jpg: Attendees examine design portfolios and physical prototypes mounted on white panels and display tables at the Design senior show's Christensen Production Stage.
design-senior-show-fa25-67.jpg: A crowd of visitors, including families with young children, fills the open exhibition floor of the CCA building during the Design senior show.
eoy-show-sp25.jpg: A large crowd of students and faculty gathers in a bright studio gallery during an end-of-year show, surrounded by colorful paintings and illustrated works pinned to the walls.
eventbrite-dice-macro-0811.jpg: Close-up macro shot looking down into the face of a translucent glittery polyhedral die, with colorful tabletop gaming dice blurred in the background.
fashion-materevolve-sp25.png: Students sit on the deck of a tall ship docked at a waterfront harbor on a clear day, gathered for an outdoor Fashion program event.

fashion-roots-stereo-film-46.jpg: Two figures wearing sunglasses and heavily patched and embroidered jackets pose closely together, shot on film in a side-by-side stereo format.
fine-arts-senior-exhibition-sp26.png: Spring 2026 Fine Arts Senior Exhibition poster on a dark background listing four weeks of rotating student shows at the Novack Gallery, with CCA branding in yellow and white text.
gala-event-2023.jpg: Two formally dressed attendees stand arm in arm at an indoor gala with floral arrangements and a large open venue visible behind them.
gamearts-2026.png: Spring 2026 Game Arts and Design Showcase poster with dark background, listing dates Thursday through Saturday, May 7th and 8th, in Design Homeroom, Room 250.
haavc-tea-ceremony-fa25.jpg: Students seated at long tables in a studio classroom participate in a tea ceremony workshop, with ceramic bowls and a chasen whisk visible in the foreground.
headshot-arr.png: A person with long dark hair and glasses smiles against a light gray background decorated with illustrated pastel stars and sparkles.
mfa-2026-thesis-banner.png: CCA MFA 2026 Thesis Exhibition banner with bold block letters in teal, yellow-green, and blue spelling out CCA MFA on a light blue background.

mfa-thesis.jpg: Bold white text reading 'CCA MFA' overlays a graphic background of interlocking teal and purple organic shapes.
mfa-writing-25th-anniversary-poster.png: Collage-style poster for the CCA MFA Writing 25th Anniversary Celebration on April 11, 2026, with torn-paper photo cutouts of alumni gatherings on a warm-toned background and event details listing lunch, panels, readings, and reception.
pole-banners-fa25.jpg: Two CCA street pole banners on an urban sidewalk read 'Where Experimentation Meets Expression,' one showing hands working with material and the other a Fashion student walking the runway.
staff-show-every-day-strange-fa25.jpg: Attendees mingle and view artwork hung on white walls during a gallery opening in a bright, wood-ceiling studio space.
